text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is here at last. Today, the
Nakayama Racecourse is swarming with
spectators.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, didn't Hishi Amazon and Narita Brian
compete here last year too?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
They've completely switched statuses since then.
Hishi Amazon has been doing really well for
herself lately, but...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian hasn't gotten her mojo back, right? I
hope she does well today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands buzz with chatter. Meanwhile, over at
the runners' tunnel...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Today's the day... Finally! You excited, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's you versus me. Narita Brian versus Hishi
Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make our rematch count!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I won't make this easy for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian takes Hishi Amazon's outstretched
hand and grips it firmly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh. I like that look in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's see... Hey, Teach! You just take it easy
and watch me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We've done so much to get here, and I'm gonna
wrap things up with a bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst nerves and excitement, the curtains rise
on the Arima Kinen at long last!
